com.hp.workpath.api.printer

Class PrintAttributes.PrintCommonAttributesBuilder<T extends PrintAttributes.PrintCommonAttributesBuilder<T>>

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.hp.workpath.api.printer.PrintAttributes.PrintCommonAttributesBuilder<T>
  • Direct Known Subclasses:
    PrintAttributes.PrintFromHttpBuilder, PrintAttributes.PrintFromStorageBuilder, PrintAttributes.PrintFromStreamBuilder, PrintAttributes.PrintFromUsbBuilder
    Enclosing class:
    PrintAttributes

    public abstract static class PrintAttributes.PrintCommonAttributesBuilder<T extends PrintAttributes.PrintCommonAttributesBuilder<T>>
extends java.lang.Object
    Base builder for common print attributes
    Since:
    API 1

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      T setAutoFit(PrintAttributes.AutoFit autoFit)
      Sets AutoFit for print
      T setCollateMode(PrintAttributes.CollateMode collateMode)
      Sets CollateMode for print
      T setColorMode(PrintAttributes.ColorMode colorMode)
      Sets color mode for print

      Sets number of copies.
      T setDocumentFormat(PrintAttributes.DocumentFormat documentFormat)
      Sets DocumentFormat for print

      Sets Duplex for print

      Sets end page of page-ranges for print.

      Sets Finishings for print
      T setJobName(java.lang.String jobName)
      Sets job name for the job

      Sets Orientation for print

      Sets OutputBin for print

      Sets PaperSize for print

      Sets PaperSource for print

      Sets PaperType for print

      Sets Print quality for print
      T setStapleMode(PrintAttributes.StapleMode stapleMode)
      Sets StapleMode for print
      T setStartPageRanges(int startPageRanges)
      Sets start page of page-ranges for print.

    • Method Detail

      • setColorMode

        public T setColorMode(PrintAttributes.ColorMode colorMode)
        Sets color mode for print
        Parameters:
        colorMode - The set of colors which the printed output will reside within.

        • Ensures that an object reference passed as a parameter to the calling method is not null.

        Returns:
        this builder for method chaining.
        Throws:
        java.lang.NullPointerException - if colorMode is null
        Since:
        API 1

      • setCopies

        public T setCopies(int copies)
        Sets number of copies.
        Parameters:
        copies - The number of copies to be produced.

        • Minimum value of copies should be 1 and it shouldn't accept value below 1
        • maximum value of copies should be 32000 and it shouldn't accept value above 32000

        Returns:
        this builder for method chaining.
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if number of copies is less than or equal to zero
        Since:
        API 1

      • setDuplex

        public T setDuplex(PrintAttributes.Duplex duplex)
        Sets Duplex for print
        Parameters:
        duplex - 1- or 2- sided printout.

        • Ensures that an object reference passed as a parameter to the calling method is not null.

        Returns:
        this builder for method chaining.
        Throws:
        java.lang.NullPointerException - if duplex is null
        Since:
        API 1

      • setAutoFit

        public T setAutoFit(PrintAttributes.AutoFit autoFit)
        Sets AutoFit for print
        Parameters:
        autoFit - Auto-fit for the printout.

        • Ensures that an object reference passed as a parameter to the calling method is not null.

        Returns:
        this builder for method chaining.
        Throws:
        java.lang.NullPointerException - if autoFit is null
        Since:
        API 1

        Sets CollateMode for print
        Parameters:

        • Ensures that an object reference passed as a parameter to the calling method is not null.

        this builder for method chaining.

      • setJobName

        public T setJobName(java.lang.String jobName)
        Sets job name for the job
        Parameters:
        jobName - Name for the job

        • Ensures that the argument string characters length is greater than zero.
        • Ensures that an string reference passed as a parameter to the calling method is not empty.
        • Ensures that an string reference passed as a parameter to the calling method is not null.
        • Expected input - String value

        Returns:
        this builder for method chaining.
        Since:
        API 3

      • setOrientation

        public T setOrientation(PrintAttributes.Orientation orientation)
        Sets Orientation for print
        Parameters:
        orientation - Orientation for the printout.

        • Ensures that an object reference passed as a parameter to the calling method is not null.

        Returns:
        this builder for method chaining.
        Throws:
        java.lang.NullPointerException - if orientation is null
        Since:
        API 5

      • setPrintQuality

        public T setPrintQuality(PrintAttributes.PrintQuality printQuality)
        Sets Print quality for print
        Parameters:
        printQuality - Print quality for the printout.

        • Ensures that an object reference passed as a parameter to the calling method is not null.

        Returns:
        this builder for method chaining.
        Throws:
        java.lang.NullPointerException - if printQuality is null
        Since:
        API 5

      • setOutputBin

        public T setOutputBin(PrintAttributes.OutputBin outputBin)
        Sets OutputBin for print
        Parameters:
        outputBin - OutputBin for the printout.

        • Ensures that an object reference passed as a parameter to the calling method is not null.

        Returns:
        this builder for method chaining.
        Throws:
        java.lang.NullPointerException - if outputBin is null
        Since:
        API 5

      • setStartPageRanges

        public T setStartPageRanges(int startPageRanges)
        Sets start page of page-ranges for print.
        Parameters:
        startPageRanges - The start page of page-ranges to be produced.

        value a numeric int value

        • Ensures that the argument numeric value is non-negative.
        • If the startPageRanges value is 0, then there is no range value and all the pages of the file will be printed.

        Returns:
        this builder for method chaining.
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if startPageRanges is less than zero
        Since:
        API 5

      • setEndPageRanges

        public T setEndPageRanges(int endPageRanges)
        Sets end page of page-ranges for print.
        Parameters:
        endPageRanges - The end page of page-ranges to be produced.

        value a numeric int value

        • Ensures that the argument numeric value is non-negative.
        • If the endPageRanges value is 0, then there is no range value and all the pages of the file will be printed.

        Returns:
        this builder for method chaining.
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if endPageRanges is less than zero
        Since:
        API 5

      • setFinishingsList

        public T setFinishingsList(java.util.List<PrintAttributes.Finishings> finishingsList)
        Sets Finishings for print
        Parameters:
        finishingsList - Finishings for the printout.

        • Ensures that an object reference passed as a parameter to the calling method is not null.
        • An empty list indicates that the option is not supported by the printer.

        Returns:
        this builder for method chaining.
        Throws:
        java.lang.NullPointerException - if finishingsList is null
        Since:
        API 5
